Home / Patients / Patient Portal

Patient Portal

Access your health information anytime through our secure online portal.

  • ✓ Send and receive messages with your primary care provider
  • ✓ Access your health records
  • ✓ Request appointments
  • ✓ View latest test results
  • ✓ View, download, and share your personal health records
  • ✓ Search health and wellness information
Access Patient Portal

Setting Up Your Account

  1. Download the free NextGen Patient Portal app
  2. Visit nextmd.com to create your account
  3. Need your enrollment code? Call (209) 430-6222, Mon–Fri 8am–5pm

Medical Records Requests

Submit a completed form by:

  • Fax: (209) 762-6808
  • Email: prforms@cmcenters.org
  • Mail: P.O. Box 779, Stockton CA 95201

Health Information Dept: (209) 546-3870

Download Medical Records Request Form →

For Stockton Residents

Mobile Community Response: In partnership with the City of Stockton, Community Medical Centers offers an alternative to 911 for Stockton citizens in need of behavioral health services. If you or someone you know is experiencing mental distress, please call (833) 311-2273, 7 days a week, 8:00 am to 11:00 pm. This helpline is for non-violent individuals with mild to moderate symptoms.

We respect your privacy: This site honors Do Not Track (DNT) and Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals. If your browser or device has privacy settings enabled, tracking will not occur.
